title: Why did Melania Trump bring a robot to Fostering the Future Together?
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump hosted a 'Fostering the Future Together' summit. She was joined by a Figure 3 humanoid robot who she said could be a teacher.

title: The April election that could determine control of Congress next year
shortDescription: Virginia's April 21 special election will influence power dynamics in Washington for the rest of President Trump's term.

title: Senators pass bill to fund DHS
shortDescription: Senators agreed to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security, except for Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Border Patrol.

title: US weighs more troop deployments, Trump says talks 'going very well'
shortDescription: The president has repeatedly delayed an ultimatum he gave to Iran, citing negotiations. Iranian officials warned the president against ultimatums.

title: Democrats face nightmare scenario in California governor’s race
shortDescription: Polling shows Republicans Steve Hilton and Chad Bianco leading the pack, while eight Democrats split the liberal vote.

title: Senator introduces bill boosting protections for journalists after FBI search
shortDescription: The “Privacy Protection Updates Act,” is intended to close legal loopholes that have been used against journalists, Wyden's office said.

title: Senate passes bill to fund most of Department of Homeland Security
shortDescription: The Senate reached an agreement to end the shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security. The deal still has to pass the House of Representatives.

title: Trump talks about Sharpies in Cabinet meeting
shortDescription: President Trump said he negotiated a change in Sharpies so he could use them rather than ballpoint pens to sign official documents at the White House.

title: US bills to have Trump's signature
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's signature will appear on all future U.S. paper currency. It's the first time this has been done for a sitting president.

title: 'I am going to do it': Trump says he will pay TSA workers
shortDescription: President Trump says he will sign an executive order ensuring TSA agents will be paid amid the chaos that has ensued during a partial shutdown.

title: Treasury will put Trump's signature on dollar bills
shortDescription: The Treasury Department announced President Trump's signature will appear on all future US paper currency, a first for a sitting president.

title: What is Trump's approval rating? It is notching lower amid Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating has been fluctuating for months, but at least one aggregator shows it reaching term lows amid Iran war.

title: Maine Senate poll shows big lead for Democratic newcomer
shortDescription: Graham Platner, a 41-year-old former Marine, holds a sizable lead over Gov. Janet Mills in Maine's Democratic Senate primary, a new poll shows.

title: Trump receives inaugural 'America First award' from Republican Party
shortDescription: President Donald Trump received the first ever 'America First award' on March 25, presented by the Republican Party as a token of appreciation.
